title: Generate a Service API for Payment Processing
scenario: Create a Service API for payment processing. The API should allow users to create, read, update, and delete payments. The API should also handle payment status updates and errors. The target output should be a Swagger API definition in YAML format. The output should be under 300 words and follow the standard Swagger v2.0 syntax.
constraints: Must include endpoints for payment creation, reading, updating, and deletion
Must handle payment status updates and errors

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the Swagger definition follows the standard v2.0 syntax
Verify if the API endpoint includes payment creation, reading, updating, and deletion endpoints, and handles payment status updates and errors
Check if the Swagger definition is clear and easy to read
